column1:
Acute care hospitals, as of January 12, 2026, identified by CMS Certification Number (CCN), located in one of the mandatory Core Based Statistical Areas (CBSAs) selected for participation in the Transforming Episode Accountability Model (TEAM) and having a Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership System (PECOS) effective date on or before 12/31/2024 for PY1 and on or before 12/31/2025 for PY2. The list below also includes voluntary participant which have accepted voluntary election letters.
Notes: CMS updates this list on a quarterly basis to accurately capture acute care hospitals in the mandatory CBSAs. CMS will identify and share a list of hospitals that satisfy the definition of a rural hospital and safety net hospital prior to each Performance Year.
